Only 5 iterations remain; we need a successful training run that yields non-zero grounding_score, then submit eval. Decision: Write and run check_load.py to determine correct import and loading method, then write new train.py using that method, and run training (1 epoch, full data, ~2k steps) with val IoU monitoring, merge model, submit eval.
